name: helpscout-cli
description: Help Scout CLI for Mailbox API v2 and Docs API v1
author: Mobile Locker <support@mobilelocker.com>

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && echo '{"type":"commonjs"}' > dist/package.json && esbuild bin/helpscout.js --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/helpscout && chmod +x dist/helpscout && esbuild bin/helpscout-mcp.js --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/helpscout-mcp && chmod +x dist/helpscout-mcp
scripts.install:bin: npm run build && cp dist/helpscout /usr/local/bin/helpscout && cp dist/helpscout-mcp /usr/local/bin/helpscout-mcp
